items.title: Fiscal deficit widens to 9.6% of FY27 target on higher spending
items.summary: India's fiscal deficit surged to 9.6% of the annual target in the first two months of the financial year, a significant jump from last year's 0.8%. items.title: Clouds over kharif sowing: Met sees below-normal rain in July
items.summary: July brings a worrying forecast for India as monsoon rains are predicted to be below normal, falling short of 94% of the long-term average. This situation could adversely affect the kharif sowing season critical for crops such as paddy and pulses.
